indicators.name: stainless steel refrigerator
indicators.rationale: A refrigerator is essential for storing food and keeping it fresh.

indicators.name: stainless steel kitchen sink
indicators.rationale: A sink is necessary for washing dishes and preparing food.

indicators.name: granite countertops
indicators.rationale: Granite countertops provide a hard, washable surface for food preparation.

indicators.name: oven
indicators.rationale: An oven is needed for baking, roasting, and other cooking methods.

indicators.name: microwave
indicators.rationale: A microwave can heat and defrost food quickly.

indicators.name: stove
indicators.rationale: A stove is essential for cooking on the hob.

reasoning_summary: The space has some key cooking affordances, but lacks a complete set of essential kitchen appliances and work surfaces. It scores 4/7 as marginally adequate for daily cooking.
